parameters.functionCode: return [{ json: { from: 'demo@example.com', subject: 'Request for pricing', body: 'Hello, we need pricing for an AI automation project.' } }];

const email = items[0].json; const body = `${email.subject} ${email.body}`.toLowerCase(); let intent = 'general'; if (body.includes('pricing') || body.includes('quote')) intent = 'sales'; if (body.includes('support') || body.includes('issue')) intent = 'support'; return [{ json: { ...email, intent, recommended_queue: intent === 'sales' ? 'sales' : 'operations', human_review_required: true } }];

meta.description: Demo workflow with sample data only. Replace the function classifier with an AI node if needed. Human review is required before labeling, routing or replying to email.
